speaker: Cade Callahan
template: But whatever you choose, Captain {captain}... remember who's still trying to keep the peace around here.

speaker: John Raythor
template: It's you! {captain}, right? We haven't properly met but I've seen your name on the mission manifest.

speaker: John Raythor
template: {captain}, since my ship is a goner. Can I join your crew?

speaker: James Fleddon
template: I am, {captain}... We have a shipment ready, but we fear the plans have been leaked to some pirates.

speaker: Unknown Contact
template: Captain {captain}, the constructor fleet is about to be finished. Meet us at the location to be briefed on our next steps.

speaker: Umbral
template: So {captain}, it is time for us to establish a foothold from which we can grow, don't you think?

speaker: Greg
template: No, {captain}... this is Ravon on the galaxy's edge.
